message:
fix(codegen): Fix type tag access panics in widen and bigint checks

- core.zig: widen() now checks both types are .int before accessing
  .int payload; handles usize+int widening properly
- comprehensions.zig: Only access .tuple field when AST is tuple node,
  not when inferred type is tuple (avoids .call field panic)
- assign.zig: Use value_type == .int instead of isIntegral() before
  accessing .int.needsBigInt() to avoid usize panic
